---
title: "About"
---

## Zheng He

I am a medical doctor and doctoral candidate (Dr. med.) at the **Medizinische Fakultät Mannheim, Universität Heidelberg**, supervised by **PD Dr. med. Martin Sigl** (1. Medizinische Klinik). My work bridges clinical vascular medicine and computational biology, focusing on the molecular mechanisms underlying VSMC phenotypic plasticity.

Before my PhD, I worked as a cardiovascular surgeon at the **Third Affiliated Hospital of Chongqing Medical University** (2020–2021), where I gained clinical experience in vascular and endovascular procedures.

---

## Education & Training

| Period | Position | Institution |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| 2023 – present | Doctoral Candidate (Dr. med.) | Medizinische Fakultät Mannheim, Universität Heidelberg |
| 2020 – 2021 | Cardiovascular Surgery Resident | Third Affiliated Hospital, Chongqing Medical University |

---

## Skills

**Bioinformatics**: R, Python, RNA-seq pipeline, scRNA-seq (Seurat), Mendelian Randomization (TwoSampleMR), WGCNA, GSVA, survival analysis

**Wet Lab**: Cell culture (primary VSMCs, HeLa, MSCs), Western Blot, Immunofluorescence, RT-qPCR, Wound Healing Assay, Flow Cytometry

**Languages**: Chinese (native), English (professional), German (intermediate)

---

## Contact

- Academic: [zheng.he@bioquant.uni-heidelberg.de](mailto:zheng.he@bioquant.uni-heidelberg.de)
- Personal: [hezheng.surgeon@gmail.com](mailto:hezheng.surgeon@gmail.com)
- ORCID: [0000-0002-0374-0368](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0374-0368)
- GitHub: [zhenghe-research](https://github.com/zhenghe-research)
